entities.name: ERROR_SEM_TIMEOUT
entities.description: The function failed to acquire the registry write mutex in the allotted time. Suggested action: Restart the system as further use of the restart manager may fail.

entities.name: RM_APP_STATUS
entities.description: Specifies the current status of an application targeted by the Restart Manager.

entities.name: RM_SHUTDOWN_TYPE
entities.description: 指定应用程序关闭方式的枚举类型。

entities.name: RmShutdown
entities.description: The RmShutdown function updates the AppStatus member of RM_PROCESS_INFO structures returned by RmGetList with detailed status information. The Restart Manager respects permissions separating different users or terminal sessions. Installers running as services with LocalSystem privileges cannot shut down or restart applications in other user or terminal sessions. Installers should implement custom methods to shut down and restart applications running in other sessions, such as launching new installer processes in those sessions.

entities.name: RM_FILTER_INFO
entities.description: 包含有关对重启或关闭操作的修改的信息。 使用 RmAddFilter、RmRemoveFilter 和 RmGetFilterList 函数向重启管理器会话注册的指定应用程序和服务添加、删除和列出修改。

members.name: FilterAction
members.description: 此成员包含 RM_FILTER_ACTION 枚举值。 使用值 RmNoRestart 可阻止重启应用程序或 服务。 使用值 RmNoShutdown 可防止关闭和重启应用程序或服务。 FilterTrigger 此成员包含 RM_FILTER_TRIGGER 枚举值。 使用值 RmFilterTriggerFile 修改可执行文件的完整路径文件名引用的应用程序的重启或关闭操作。 使用值 RmFilterTriggerProcess 可 修改 RM_UNIQUE_PROCESS 结构引用的应用程序的重启或关闭操作。 使用值 RmFilterTriggerService 修改由短服务名称引用的服务的重启或关闭操作。

members.name: cbNextOffset
members.description: 到下一个结构的偏移量（以字节为单位）。 strFilename 如果 FilterTrigger 的值为 RmFilterTriggerFile，则此成员包含指向包含应用程序文件名的 字符串值的指针。 Process 如果 FilterTrigger 的值为 RmFilterTriggerProcess，则此成员是应用程序的

entities.name: RmAddFilter
entities.description: Adds a filter to specify applications or services to be excluded from shutdown or restart operations. Must be called from an application that has started a session by calling RmStartSession.
entities.return_value: Returns ERROR_SUCCESS if successful, or a system error code from Winerror.h on failure.

entities.name: RM_APP_TYPE
entities.description: 指定由 RM_PROCESS_INFO 结构描述的应用程序的类型。

entities.name: RmStatusUnknown
entities.description: Resource manager status unknown (value = 0x0)

entities.name: RmStatusStoppedOther
entities.description: Enum value indicating the application was stopped by another restart manager session. Value: 0x4

entities.name: RmStatusErrorOnStop
entities.description: Value: 0x10 - The Restart Manager encountered an error while stopping an application.

entities.name: RmStatusErrorOnRestart
entities.description: Enumeration value indicating an error occurred during restart. Part of RmStatus enum: RmStatusErrorOnRestart = 0x20, RmStatusShutdownMasked = 0x40, RmStatusRestartMasked = 0x80

entities.name: RmStatusRunning
entities.description: Value: 0x1 - Indicates the application is currently running.

entities.name: RmStatusStopped
entities.description: Value: 0x2 - Indicates the Restart Manager has stopped the application.

entities.name: RmStatusRestarted
entities.description: Value: 0x8 - Indicates the Restart Manager has restarted the application.

entities.name: RmStatusShutdownMasked
entities.description: Value: 0x40. Indicates that shutdown is masked by the filter.

entities.name: RmUnknownApp
entities.description: 值为0，表示应用程序不能归类为任何其他类型。此类型的应用程序只能通过强制关闭来关闭。

entities.name: RmCritical
entities.description: Value: 1000. Indicates a system restart is required to complete installation because the process could not be shut down. Possible reasons: the process is critical, user lacks shutdown permissions, or process belongs to the main installer that started the restart manager.

entities.name: RmMainWindow
entities.description: 标识 Windows 应用程序作为显示顶级窗口的独立进程运行的常量值

entities.name: RmOtherWindow
entities.description: 值为2，表示不作为独立进程运行且不显示顶级窗口的Windows应用程序。

entities.name: RmExplorer
entities.description: 标识应用程序是 Windows 资源管理器，值为 4

entities.name: RmConsole
entities.description: Value: 5. Indicates the application is a standalone console application.

entities.name: RM_FILTER_ACTION
entities.description: 枚举 指定应用于重启或关闭操作的修改类型。

entities.name: RmNoRestart
entities.description: 值：1。阻止重启指定的应用程序或服务。

entities.name: RmInvalidFilterAction
entities.description: 常量值0，表示无效的筛选操作

entities.name: RM_PROCESS_INFO
entities.description: 包含有关正在运行的应用程序或服务的信息，用于重启管理器(Restart Manager)功能。

members.name: Process
members.description: 包含一个 RM_UNIQUE_PROCESS 结构，该结构按应用程序的 PID 和进程开始的时间唯一标识应用程序。 strAppName[CCH_RM_MAX_APP_NAME + 1] 如果进程是一个服务，则此参数返回该服务的长名称。 如果进程不是服务，则此参数返回应用程序的用户友好名称。 如果进程是关键进程，并且安装程序使用提升的权限运行，则此参数返回关键进程的可执行文件的名称。 如果进程是关键进程，并且安装程序 作为服务运行，则此参数返回关键进程的长名称。 strServiceShortName[CCH_RM_MAX_SVC_NAME + 1] 如果进程是一个服务，则这是服务的短名称。 如果进程不是服务，则不使用此成员。 ApplicationType 包含一个 RM_APP_TYPE 枚举值，该值将应用程序类型指定为 RmUnknownApp、 RmMainWindow、 RmOtherWindow、 RmService、 RmExplorer 或 RmCritical。

entities.name: RM_FILTER_TRIGGER
entities.description: 描述应用程序或服务的重启或关闭操作的枚举类型。

entities.name: RmFilterTriggerInvalid
entities.description: 值为0，表示无效的筛选器触发器。其他相关常量：RmFilterTriggerFile(修改由其可执行文件名标识的应用程序的关闭或重启操作)、RmFilterTriggerProcess(修改由RM_UNIQUE_PROCESS结构标识的应用程序的关闭或重启操作)、RmFilterTriggerService(修改由服务短名称标识的服务的关闭或重启操作)。

entities.name: AppStatus
entities.description: 位掩码常量，用于描述应用程序的当前状态。请参阅 RM_APP_STATUS 枚举。

entities.name: RmGetList
entities.description: Retrieves the list of applications and services that are using resources registered with the Restart Manager session. [Desktop apps only]

parameters.name: dwSessionHandle
parameters.description: 现有重启管理器会话的句柄。[out] pnProcInfoNeeded 指向接收 RM_PROCESS_INFO 结构所需的数组大小的指针，该结构返回所有受影响的应用程序和服务的信息。

parameters.name: pnProcInfo
parameters.description: 指向数组中 RM_PROCESS_INFO 结构的总数和填充结构数的指针。[in, out, optional] rgAffectedApps 一个由 RM_PROCESS_INFO 结构构成的数组，这些结构使用已注册到会话的资源列出应用程序和服务。

parameters.name: lpdwRebootReasons
parameters.description: 指向接收 RM_REBOOT_REASON 枚举值的位置的指针，该枚举描述需要系统重启的原因。

return_value.description: 这是收到的最新错误。 该函数可以返回 Winerror.h 中定义的 系统错误代码之一。 价值

entities.name: RM_REBOOT_REASON
entities.description: 枚举类型，描述资源管理器(RM)需要重启系统的原因。

entities.name: RmRebootReasonNone
entities.description: 值为0x0，表示不需要重启系统。

entities.name: RmRebootReasonSessionMismatch
entities.description: Value: 0x2 - One or more processes are running in a different terminal services session. RmRebootReasonCriticalProcess Value: 0x4 - System reboot required because one or more processes to be shut down are critical processes.

entities.name: RmRebootReasonCriticalService
entities.description: Value: 0x8. The system needs to be restarted because one or more services to be shut down are critical services.

entities.name: RmShutdownOnlyRegistered
entities.description: 0x10 [in, optional] Specifies that applications should only be shut down if they have been registered for restart using RegisterApplicationRestart. If any process or service cannot be restarted, no processes or services will be shut down.
entities.return_value: Can return system error codes defined in Winerror.h
entities.remarks: 启动应用程序强制关闭之前等待的时间由以下注册表项指定。 HKCU\控制面板\Desktop\HungAppTimeout 在启动强制关闭服务之前等待的时间由以下注册表项指定。 HKLM\系统\CurrentControlSet\控制\WaitToKillServiceTimeout

entities.name: RmForceShutdown
entities.description: Value: 0x1. Forces unresponsive applications and services to shut down after timeout period. Applications not responding to Restart Manager shutdown requests are forced closed after 30 seconds. Services not responding are forced closed after 20 seconds. These default times can be changed by modifying registry keys mentioned in remarks.

entities.name: ERROR_REQUEST_OUT_OF_SEQUENCE
entities.description: 错误码776，表示在调用RmShutdown函数之前使用有效的会话句柄调用了RmRestart函数
